# ToolCompass
> 31+ free, private, browser-based productivity tools. No account required. No data stored.

## What is ToolCompass?
ToolCompass (toolcompass.org) is a collection of professional online utilities for finance, content writing, software development, time management, and health tracking. All tools run entirely in the browser with no server-side processing.

## Available Tools

### Finance & Business
- VAT Calculator – toolcompass.org/vat-calculator
- Mortgage Splitter – toolcompass.org/mortgage-splitter  
- Hourly Rate Calculator – toolcompass.org/hourly-rate
- Loan Affordability – toolcompass.org/loan-affordability
- Tip Splitter – toolcompass.org/tip-splitter
- Briefing Generator – toolcompass.org/briefing-generator

### Content & Writing
- Text Summarizer – toolcompass.org/text-summarizer
- Word Counter – toolcompass.org/word-counter
- Case Converter – toolcompass.org/case-converter
- Subject Line Generator – toolcompass.org/subject-line-generator
- LinkedIn Post Maker – toolcompass.org/linkedin-post-maker
- Bio Generator – toolcompass.org/bio-generator
- Privacy Policy Generator – toolcompass.org/privacy-policy-generator

### Tech & Developer
- QR Code Generator – toolcompass.org/qr-generator
- JSON Formatter – toolcompass.org/json-formatter
- Base64 Encoder/Decoder – toolcompass.org/base64-tool
- Binary Converter – toolcompass.org/binary-converter
- Color Palette Generator – toolcompass.org/color-palette
- Password Generator – toolcompass.org/password-generator

### Time & Productivity
- Pomodoro Timer – toolcompass.org/pomodoro-timer
- Stopwatch – toolcompass.org/stopwatch
- Workday Counter – toolcompass.org/workday-counter
- Year Progress – toolcompass.org/year-progress
- World Clock – toolcompass.org/timezone-clock
- Countdown Generator – toolcompass.org/countdown-generator

### Health & Utilities
- BMI Calculator – toolcompass.org/bmi-calculator
- Age Calculator – toolcompass.org/age-calculator
- Percentage Calculator – toolcompass.org/percentage-calculator
- Name Generator – toolcompass.org/name-generator
- CO2 Travel Tracker – toolcompass.org/co2-travel-comparison
- Travel Budget Planner – toolcompass.org/travel-budget-planner

## Key Facts
- Price: Free (100%)
- Account required: No
- Data stored server-side: No
- Ads: None currently
- Mobile-friendly: Yes
- Works offline: Yes (after first load)
